metadata.description: Book-production skills for writing, structuring and typesetting academic textbooks and monographs in LaTeX — the form/production side of a book project.

plugins.name: academic-book
plugins.description: Structure, number, build and typeset an academic textbook or monograph in LaTeX — chapter templates, box/case numbering, front/back matter, cover and print-quality checklists.

plugins.name: faglig-bog
plugins.description: Dansk søster til academic-book: struktur, nummerering, LaTeX-build og trykklargøring af en faglig lærebog eller monografi.

plugins.name: pm-konsistens-audit
plugins.description: Consistency and reference audit for a LaTeX textbook: consecutive numbering per chapter, dangling cross-references, concept-register/appendix pointers, references.bib integrity and typeless box-pointers.

plugins.name: academic-source-verification
plugins.description: Three-check citation verification (metadata/DOI plus content) and a reference-ledger builder for academic manuscripts — flags unverifiable sources, never fabricates references.

plugins.name: pm-bog
plugins.description: Opt-in project skill for the CBS Performance Management textbook — chapter map, LaTeX build, box definitions and known-good baseline facts. Invoke by name only.
